title: 2 X Large Lightweight Plastic 28.5 x 40.5cm White Grey Non Slip Serving Tray
features: SUPERIOR QUALITY: Homeshop serving tray is Made of premium quality food-grade plastic, these food serving trays are strong, sturdy, durable, and resistant to stains, spills, or breakage, ensuring that it will last for years! The structure will remain rigid and will not warp, resulting in an uneven surface.

DUAL GRIP LAP TRAY: The rectangle tray has a rubberized design that acts as a grip on both the top and bottom of the tray. The tray's bottom grip provides anti-slip properties, while the upper surface grip ensures the tray's contents do not slip when in motion. In wet conditions, the grip remains effective.

Easy Grip Hadles: The strong anti-slip handles allow you to grip the plastic trays comfortably and securely when transporting food and hot beverages. It allows you to safely hold the trays without the risk of an accident. The non-slip surface and easy-grip handles make it super simple to balance food without making a mess or spilling

Food serving trays: If desired, this plastic anti slip trays can be used in your home kitchen, restaurants, or even as decor. It can also be used as a lap tray for eating, making it ideal for in-bed eating and drinking. It has an anti-slip feature to keep you safe in the kitchen, workplace, or restaurants.

SUITABLE FOR A VARIETY OF OCCASIONS - These BPA-Free non slip tray ideal for entertaining guests or friends, and are ideal for afternoon tea, parties, camping, barbecues, weddings, and banquets to accommodate sandwiches, bread, cakes, desserts, sweets, fruits, wine, beer, soda, orange juice, and other items.
description: These large lightweight high grade trays is made from plastic, designed with none slip underside and surface area. With angled sides and featuring wide non slip cut hole handles for stability, easy carrying and to avoid spillages.
